creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173314
gentium.shar

Gentium is a typeface family designed to enable the diverse ethnic
groups around the world who use the Latin, Cyrillic and Greek scripts
to produce readable, high-quality publications.  It supports a wide
range of Latin- and Cyrillic-based alphabets.

WWW: http://scripts.sil.org/Gentium

These are the original Gentium fonts of which both x11-fonts/gentium-{basic,plus} are later versions AFAICT.  They're a prerequisite for getting a working port of SILE (http://sile-typesetter.org/).

portlint ok, Poudriere testport@FreeBSD 9.3/i386 and 10.2/amd64 ok
